notes: Player card now shows 'FROM <folder name>' tucked under the now-playing track title, so you can tell at a glance which folder the current audio is sourced from. The folder caption is set once when the folder loads (FS Access dirHandle.name on Chrome Android, or derived from webkitRelativePath on browsers that fall back to the multi-select picker) and stays visible for the whole session. Hidden entirely when no folder is loaded.
